zh.Radcliffe, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Tyldesley於1430年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃斯利時，她的父親Hugh Tyldesley60歲，母親Cecilia de   Ashton58歲。她於大約1450年與Sir John Radcliffe在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.Radcliffe, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Tyldesley于1430年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃斯利时，她的父亲Hugh Tyldesley60岁，母亲Cecilia de   Ashton58岁。她于大约1450年与Sir John Radcliffe在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyldesley

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Tyldesley was born in 1430, in Worsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Tyldesley, was 60 and her mother, Cecilia de   Ashton, was 58. She married Sir John Radcliffe about 1450, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1470, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Tyldesley est née en 1430, à Worsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Tyldesley, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Cecilia de   Ashton, avait 58 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Radcliffe environ 1450, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Tyldesley 1430 in Worsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Tyldesley 60 und ihre Mutter Cecilia de   Ashton 58. Sie hat um 1450 in Lancashire, England Sir John Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Tyldesley è nata il nel 1430 nel Worsley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Tyldesley, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Cecilia de   Ashton, aveva 58 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Radcliffe circa 1450, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Tyldesleyが1430年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスリーで生まれた時，父Hugh Tyldesleyは60歳，母Cecilia de   Ashtonは58歳であった。約1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir John Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Tyldesley(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Tyldesley(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia de   Ashton(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir John Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Tyldesley nasceu em 1430, em Worsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Tyldesley, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de   Ashton, tinha 58 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Radcliffe aproximadamente 1450, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Tyldesley родилась в 1430 г. в местности ворсли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Tyldesley было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de   Ashton, 58. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Radcliffe около 1450 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Tyldesley nació en 1430, en Worsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Tyldesley, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Cecilia de   Ashton, tenía 58 años. Se casó con Sir John Radcliffe aproximadamente 1450, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1470, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
